specific_question: Which Lee's Market app notification feature caused the highest number of error reports or crashes in Q2 2025?
answer: Internal app metrics indicate that the “Daily FUN-FUN Promo Push” notification triggered the most error reports and minor crashes among first-time users in Q2 2025.
